episode_topic: AI business blueprints: idea + evidence (real companies, real numbers) + tool stack + playbook
audience: Senior professionals in career transition; builders who want income outside employment
tone: Clean, high-end, minimal. Documentary rigor, operator credibility. No hype, no income promises.
themes_that_perform: the moment a tool replaces a payroll line
notes: Used when cutting Shorts from rendered Operator Economy long-forms via pipeline.py. shorts_briefs.json from the originate run marks pre-scored moments.
